meta.title: Mechanical & Instruments Checkout
meta.titleCn: 机械与仪表调试检查清单

items.title: Installation of the drum pulper visually checked
items.titleCn: 转鼓碎浆机安装目视检查

items.title: Sealing water and cooling water pipe flushed and connected
items.titleCn: 密封水和冷却水管路冲洗并连接

items.title: Check sealing water & cooling water flow, no plugged issue
items.titleCn: 检查密封水和冷却水流量，无堵塞

items.title: Function of sealing water flow switch checked
items.titleCn: 密封水流量开关功能检查

items.title: Oil level (gear box) checked
items.titleCn: 齿轮箱油位检查

items.title: Function of temperature switches (gear box) checked
items.titleCn: 齿轮箱温度开关功能检查

items.title: Function of oil pressure switch (gear box) checked
items.titleCn: 齿轮箱油压开关功能检查

items.title: Function of difference pressure switch (gear box) checked
items.titleCn: 齿轮箱差压开关功能检查

items.title: Circulation oil pump rotation test, check the pressure
items.titleCn: 循环油泵旋转测试，检查压力

items.title: Drum pulper position sensor signal test
items.titleCn: 转鼓碎浆机位置传感器信号测试

items.title: Lubrication system control box I/O checked (SKF system)
items.titleCn: 润滑系统控制箱 I/O 检查 (SKF系统)

items.title: Install Lubrication oil pump (SKF system)
items.titleCn: 安装润滑油泵 (SKF系统)

items.title: Flushing air tube completely
items.titleCn: 空气管路完全冲洗

items.title: Flushing Lubrication oil pipe with grease (SKF system)
items.titleCn: 润滑油脂管路冲洗 (SKF系统)

items.title: Refill grease for all bearings
items.titleCn: 所有轴承补充润滑脂

items.title: Check and adjust the oil spray nozzle angle (SKF system)
items.titleCn: 检查和调整油喷嘴角度 (SKF系统)

items.title: Drum pulper main motor rotation test without coupling
items.titleCn: 转鼓碎浆机主电机旋转测试（未连接联轴器）

items.title: Motor power transmitter check
items.titleCn: 电机功率变送器检查

items.title: Slow drive control box check & brake wiring check
items.titleCn: 慢速驱动控制箱和制动接线检查

items.title: Fill oil for fluid coupling
items.titleCn: 液力联轴器加油

items.title: Install back the coupling and run the main motor, at the same time run the SKF system
items.titleCn: 连接联轴器，运行主电机+SKF系统

items.title: Vibrations, noise, temperature check
items.titleCn: 振动、噪音、温度检查

items.title: Bottom vat agitator rotation test
items.titleCn: 底部槽体搅拌器旋转测试
